calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Laurence Blau appeared by telephone for Marion Parrish (Surviving Spouse).

Mr. Blau stated that he wrote the deeds, that the Mother passed away and left everything to the four kids, that the Son Michael passes away and leaves everything to the Spouse, and that in the meantime, the other three children wanted their distribution. Mr. Blau also stated that he does not think the language in the deeds is probate administration, that the word "administration" is the hang up, that administration means the process of this case to be resolved, that he does not want to do a probate, and that he can go back and do a corrected deed. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
